---
title: "phyloP and SpliceAI Analysis for Non-Exonic Decoy IDs"
author: "Analysis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    fig.width: 12
    fig.height: 8
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 8)
```

```{r load-libraries}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(viridis)
library(gridExtra)
library(data.table)
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
library(tibble)
library(Rtsne)
library(tidymodels)
library(lme4)
library(multilevelmod)
```

```{r load-phylop-data}
# Load filtered phyloP summary data (decoy) - protein coding filtered
phylop_data <- read.table("phyloP/decoy/phyloP_decoy_protein_coding.tsv", 
                          sep = "\t", 
                          header = TRUE,
                          stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

cat("Loaded phyloP decoy data (protein coding filtered):\n")
cat("  Total rows:", nrow(phylop_data), "\n")
cat("  Columns:", paste(colnames(phylop_data), collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Load filtered phyloP control data
phylop_control_data <- fread("phyloP_ctrl_summary_filtered_protein_coding.tsv", 
                             sep = "\t", 
                             header = TRUE)

cat("\nLoaded phyloP control data:\n")
cat("  Total rows:", nrow(phylop_control_data), "\n")
cat("  Columns:", paste(colnames(phylop_control_data), collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

```{r load-spliceai-data}
# Load filtered SpliceAI MAF data (min 0.01 SpliceAI score in human)
spliceai_data <- read.table("SpliceAI_MAF_protein_coding_min0.01.tsv",
                            sep = "\t",
                            header = TRUE,
                            stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

cat("Loaded SpliceAI data (filtered for min 0.01 score in human):\n")
cat("  Total rows:", nrow(spliceai_data), "\n")
cat("  Total columns:", ncol(spliceai_data), "\n")
```

```{r prepare-spliceai-for-plotting}
# Prepare SpliceAI data for violin plot
species_cols <- setdiff(colnames(spliceai_data), "decoyID")

# Convert to long format for plotting
spliceai_long <- spliceai_data %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(species_cols),
               names_to = "species",
               values_to = "spliceai_score") %>%
  # Convert to numeric, handling -1.000000 as NA
  mutate(spliceai_score = as.numeric(ifelse(spliceai_score == "-1.000000", NA, spliceai_score)))

cat("Prepared SpliceAI data for plotting:\n")
cat("  Total data points:", nrow(spliceai_long), "\n")
cat("  Non-missing values:", sum(!is.na(spliceai_long$spliceai_score)), "\n")
cat("  Missing values:", sum(is.na(spliceai_long$spliceai_score)), "\n")
```

```{r load-control-data}
# Load control SpliceAI data
control_data <- fread("control_spliceai_filtered_protein_coding.tsv", sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

cat("Loaded control SpliceAI data:\n")
cat("  Total rows:", nrow(control_data), "\n")
cat("  Total columns:", ncol(control_data), "\n")

# Extract human (hg38) scores and origin
control_human <- control_data %>%
  select(decoyID, hg38) %>%
  mutate(
    human_score = as.numeric(ifelse(hg38 == "-1.000000", NA, hg38)),
    origin = case_when(
      grepl("_C$", decoyID) ~ "Canonical",
      grepl("_P$", decoyID) ~ "NonPRPF8",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(human_score))

cat("\nControl human scores by origin:\n")
cat("  Canonical:", sum(control_human$origin == "Canonical"), "\n")
cat("  NonPRPF8:", sum(control_human$origin == "NonPRPF8"), "\n")
```

# Statistical Analysis: Combined Dataset Comparison

## Prepare Combined Dataset for Analysis

```{r prepare-combined-dataset}
# Function to extract gene name from decoyID
# Format: GENE_COORDINATE or GENE_COORDINATE_SUFFIX
extract_gene_name <- function(decoy_id) {
  # Remove suffix if present (_D, _C, _P)
  base_id <- gsub("_(D|C|P)$", "", decoy_id)
  # Extract gene name (everything before the last underscore)
  parts <- strsplit(base_id, "_")[[1]]
  if (length(parts) > 1) {
    # Gene name is everything except the last part (coordinate)
    paste(parts[-length(parts)], collapse = "_")
  } else {
    base_id
  }
}

# Function to calculate mean SpliceAI score ignoring -1
calculate_mean_score <- function(row_data) {
  # Convert to numeric, excluding -1 values
  scores <- as.numeric(row_data)
  scores <- scores[!is.na(scores) & scores != -1]
  if (length(scores) == 0) {
    return(NA)
  }
  mean(scores, na.rm = TRUE)
}

# Function to calculate max SpliceAI score ignoring -1
calculate_max_score <- function(row_data) {
  # Convert to numeric, excluding -1 values
  scores <- as.numeric(row_data)
  scores <- scores[!is.na(scores) & scores != -1]
  if (length(scores) == 0) {
    return(NA)
  }
  max(scores, na.rm = TRUE)
}

# Add _D suffix to protein coding decoyIDs
spliceai_data_labeled <- spliceai_data %>%
  mutate(decoyID = paste0(decoyID, "_D"))

# Prepare protein coding data
species_cols_pc <- setdiff(colnames(spliceai_data_labeled), "decoyID")
pc_transformed <- spliceai_data_labeled %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    mean_spliceai_score = calculate_mean_score(c_across(all_of(species_cols_pc))),
    max_spliceai_score = calculate_max_score(c_across(all_of(species_cols_pc))),
    data_origin = "Decoy",
    gene_name = extract_gene_name(decoyID)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(decoyID, mean_spliceai_score, max_spliceai_score, data_origin, gene_name)

# Prepare control data
species_cols_ctrl <- setdiff(colnames(control_data), "decoyID")
control_transformed <- control_data %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    mean_spliceai_score = calculate_mean_score(c_across(all_of(species_cols_ctrl))),
    max_spliceai_score = calculate_max_score(c_across(all_of(species_cols_ctrl))),
    data_origin = case_when(
      grepl("_C$", decoyID) ~ "Canonical",
      grepl("_P$", decoyID) ~ "NonPRPF8",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"
    ),
    gene_name = extract_gene_name(decoyID)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(decoyID, mean_spliceai_score, max_spliceai_score, data_origin, gene_name)

# Combine datasets
combined_transformed <- bind_rows(pc_transformed, control_transformed) %>%
  filter(!is.na(mean_spliceai_score) & !is.na(max_spliceai_score))

# Add phyloP data from decoy dataset
phylop_decoy_merged <- phylop_data %>%
  mutate(decoyID = paste0(MAF_file, "_D")) %>%
  select(decoyID, mean_phylop, max_phylop, fraction_constrained, 
         fraction_constrained_p01, sum_positive_phylop)

# Add phyloP data from control dataset
phylop_control_merged <- phylop_control_data %>%
  select(decoyID, mean_phylop, max_phylop, fraction_constrained, 
         fraction_constrained_p01, sum_positive_phylop)

# Combine phyloP data
phylop_all <- bind_rows(phylop_decoy_merged, phylop_control_merged)

# Merge phyloP data into combined_transformed
combined_transformed <- combined_transformed %>%
  left_join(phylop_all, by = "decoyID") %>%
  mutate(
    mean_phylop = as.numeric(mean_phylop),
    max_phylop = as.numeric(max_phylop),
    fraction_constrained = as.numeric(fraction_constrained),
    fraction_constrained_p01 = as.numeric(fraction_constrained_p01),
    sum_positive_phylop = as.numeric(sum_positive_phylop)
  )

cat("Combined transformed dataset:\n")
cat("  Total rows:", nrow(combined_transformed), "\n")
cat("  Decoy (_D):", sum(combined_transformed$data_origin == "Decoy"), "\n")
cat("  Canonical (_C):", sum(combined_transformed$data_origin == "Canonical"), "\n")
cat("  NonPRPF8 (_P):", sum(combined_transformed$data_origin == "NonPRPF8"), "\n")
cat("  Unique genes:", length(unique(combined_transformed$gene_name)), "\n")
cat("\nphyloP data coverage:\n")
cat("  Rows with phyloP data:", sum(!is.na(combined_transformed$mean_phylop)), "\n")
cat("  Rows without phyloP data:", sum(is.na(combined_transformed$mean_phylop)), "\n")

# Display summary statistics by origin
cat("\nSummary statistics by data origin:\n")
combined_transformed %>%
  group_by(data_origin) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_mean_score = mean(mean_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_mean_score = median(mean_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_mean_score = sd(mean_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_mean_score = min(mean_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_mean_score = max(mean_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_max_score = mean(max_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_max_score = median(max_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_max_score = sd(max_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_max_score = min(max_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_max_score = max(max_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  print()
```

## SpliceAI Score Distributions by Dataset
<｜tool▁calls▁begin｜><｜tool▁call▁begin｜>
read_file

```{r faceted-violin-max-spliceai}
# Prepare data for faceted violin plot - max scores
all_max_spliceai_long <- combined_transformed %>%
  select(decoyID, data_origin, max_spliceai_score) %>%
  filter(!is.na(max_spliceai_score) & max_spliceai_score != -1) %>%
  mutate(data_origin = factor(data_origin, levels = c("Decoy", "Canonical", "NonPRPF8")))

# Create faceted violin plot for max scores
p_violin_max_faceted <- ggplot(all_max_spliceai_long, aes(x = "", y = max_spliceai_score, fill = data_origin)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7, trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white", alpha = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA) +
  facet_wrap(~ data_origin, ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Decoy" = "salmon", "Canonical" = "darkgreen", "NonPRPF8" = "steelblue")) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Max SpliceAI Scores by Data Origin",
       subtitle = "All species combined, -1 values excluded",
       x = "",
       y = "Max SpliceAI Score",
       fill = "Data Origin") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none")

print(p_violin_max_faceted)

cat("Max SpliceAI Score Summary by Data Origin:\n")
all_max_spliceai_long %>%
  group_by(data_origin) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(max_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(max_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(max_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(max_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(max_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  print()
```

```{r scatter-plot-max-spliceai-vs-sum-positive-phylop}
# Prepare data with max SpliceAI and sum positive phyloP scores
max_spliceai_phylop_data <- combined_transformed %>%
  select(decoyID, data_origin, max_spliceai_score, sum_positive_phylop) %>%
  filter(!is.na(max_spliceai_score) & max_spliceai_score != -1 & !is.na(sum_positive_phylop) & sum_positive_phylop > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    data_origin = factor(data_origin, levels = c("Decoy", "Canonical", "NonPRPF8")),
    gene_name = sapply(decoyID, function(id) {
      # Remove suffix if present (_D, _C, _P)
      base_id <- gsub("_(D|C|P)$", "", id)
      # Extract gene name (everything before the last underscore)
      parts <- strsplit(base_id, "_")[[1]]
      if (length(parts) > 1) {
        paste(parts[-length(parts)], collapse = "_")
      } else {
        base_id
      }
    })
  )

# Filter for specific HNRNPH1 decoy site
hnrnph1_specific_scatter <- filter(max_spliceai_phylop_data, 
                                   grepl("HNRNPH1_179620582", decoyID) & data_origin == "Decoy")

# Get positions for annotation (using log scale for y-axis)
if (nrow(hnrnph1_specific_scatter) > 0) {
  x_pos_scatter <- hnrnph1_specific_scatter$max_spliceai_score[1]
  y_pos_scatter <- hnrnph1_specific_scatter$sum_positive_phylop[1]
  # Calculate label positions (offset from point, multiplicative for log scale)
  x_range <- range(max_spliceai_phylop_data$max_spliceai_score, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_range <- range(max_spliceai_phylop_data$sum_positive_phylop, na.rm = TRUE)
  x_label <- x_pos_scatter
  y_label <- y_pos_scatter * 1.5  # Multiplicative offset for log scale
} else {
  x_pos_scatter <- NA
  y_pos_scatter <- NA
  x_label <- NA
  y_label <- NA
}

# Create scatter plot: max SpliceAI vs sum positive phyloP (log scale) with density overlay
p_scatter_max <- ggplot(max_spliceai_phylop_data, aes(x = max_spliceai_score, y = sum_positive_phylop)) +
  # Add density contours (overlay density information)
  geom_density_2d(aes(color = data_origin), alpha = 0.8, linewidth = .8, bins = 10) +
  # Background scatter points colored by data origin
  geom_point(aes(color = data_origin), alpha = 0.8, size = 0.8) +
  # Add scatter point for specific HNRNPH1 decoy site
  {if (nrow(hnrnph1_specific_scatter) > 0) 
    geom_point(data = hnrnph1_specific_scatter, 
               aes(x = max_spliceai_score, y = sum_positive_phylop), 
               color = "black", 
               size = 5, 
               shape = 21, 
               fill = "red", 
               alpha = 0.9)} +
  # Add arrow pointing to the point
  {if (!is.na(x_pos_scatter) && !is.na(y_pos_scatter) && !is.na(y_label))
    annotate("segment", 
             x = x_label, xend = x_pos_scatter,
             y = y_label, yend = y_pos_scatter,
             arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"), type = "closed"),
             color = "red", linewidth = 1)} +
  # Add text callout
  {if (!is.na(x_label) && !is.na(y_label))
    annotate("text", 
             x = x_label, y = y_label,
             label = "HNRNPH1_179620582",
             color = "red", size = 4, fontface = "bold",
             hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0)} +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log10", labels = scales::trans_format("log10", scales::math_format(10^.x))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Decoy" = "salmon", "Canonical" = "darkgreen", "NonPRPF8" = "steelblue")) +
  labs(title = "Max SpliceAI Score vs Sum Positive phyloP Score by Data Origin",
       subtitle = "HNRNPH1_179620582 highlighted | Y-axis: log10 scale | Density contours overlaid",
       x = "Max SpliceAI Score",
       y = "Sum Positive phyloP (log10)",
       color = "Data Origin") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.position = "right")

print(p_scatter_max)

# Print summary for specific HNRNPH1 decoy site
cat("\nHNRNPH1_179620582 summary:\n")
if (nrow(hnrnph1_specific_scatter) > 0) {
  cat("  Found:", nrow(hnrnph1_specific_scatter), "entry\n")
  cat("  Max SpliceAI score:", round(hnrnph1_specific_scatter$max_spliceai_score[1], 4), "\n")
  cat("  Sum positive phyloP score:", round(hnrnph1_specific_scatter$sum_positive_phylop[1], 4), "\n")
  cat("  Decoy ID:", hnrnph1_specific_scatter$decoyID[1], "\n")
} else {
  cat("  Site not found in dataset\n")
}
```
## t-SNE Analysis

```{r tsne-analysis}
# Prepare data for t-SNE with three variables: gene_name, max_spliceai_score, and data_origin
# Use ALL genes as dummy variables (computationally intensive approach)

# Get all unique genes
all_genes_tsne <- unique(combined_transformed$gene_name)
n_genes_tsne <- length(all_genes_tsne)

cat("t-SNE Analysis (Computationally Intensive - All Genes):\n")
cat("  Total unique genes:", n_genes_tsne, "\n")
cat("  This will create", n_genes_tsne, "dummy variables for genes\n")
cat("  Warning: This may take a long time and use significant memory\n")

# Prepare t-SNE data
tsne_data_prep <- combined_transformed %>%
  filter(!is.na(max_spliceai_score) & max_spliceai_score != -1) %>%
  mutate(
    # Encode data origin as dummy variables
    origin_Decoy = as.numeric(data_origin == "Decoy"),
    origin_Canonical = as.numeric(data_origin == "Canonical"),
    origin_NonPRPF8 = as.numeric(data_origin == "NonPRPF8")
  )

cat("\nCreating dummy variables for all genes (this may take a while)...\n")
# Create dummy variables for ALL genes
for (gene in all_genes_tsne) {
  col_name <- paste0("gene_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]", "_", gene))
  tsne_data_prep[[col_name]] <- as.numeric(tsne_data_prep$gene_name == gene)
  if (which(all_genes_tsne == gene) %% 100 == 0) {
    cat("  Processed", which(all_genes_tsne == gene), "of", n_genes_tsne, "genes\n")
  }
}

# Select variables for t-SNE: max_score, origin dummies, and ALL gene dummies
origin_vars_tsne <- c("origin_Decoy", "origin_Canonical", "origin_NonPRPF8")
gene_vars_tsne <- paste0("gene_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]", "_", all_genes_tsne))
tsne_vars <- tsne_data_prep %>%
  select(max_spliceai_score, all_of(origin_vars_tsne), all_of(gene_vars_tsne)) %>%
  as.matrix()

cat("\nt-SNE Variables:\n")
cat("  Continuous variable: max_spliceai_score\n")
cat("  Data origin variables:", length(origin_vars_tsne), "\n")
cat("  Gene variables (ALL genes):", length(gene_vars_tsne), "\n")
cat("  Total variables:", ncol(tsne_vars), "\n")
cat("  Total observations:", nrow(tsne_vars), "\n")
cat("  Matrix size:", format(object.size(tsne_vars), units = "MB"), "\n")

# Perform t-SNE (computationally intensive with all genes)
set.seed(42)  # For reproducibility
tsne_result <- Rtsne(tsne_vars, 
                     dims = 2, 
                     perplexity = 30,
                     partial_pca = TRUE,
                     verbose = TRUE,
                     theta = 0.2,
                     max_iter = 1000,
                     num_threads = 0,
                     check_duplicates = FALSE)

# Extract t-SNE coordinates
tsne_coords <- data.frame(
  decoyID = tsne_data_prep$decoyID,
  tSNE1 = tsne_result$Y[, 1],
  tSNE2 = tsne_result$Y[, 2],
  data_origin = tsne_data_prep$data_origin,
  gene_name = tsne_data_prep$gene_name,
  max_spliceai_score = tsne_data_prep$max_spliceai_score
)

# Plot t-SNE colored by data origin
p_tsne_origin <- ggplot(tsne_coords, aes(x = tSNE1, y = tSNE2, color = data_origin)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 0.8) +
  stat_ellipse(aes(color = data_origin), type = "norm", level = 0.95, linetype = 2, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Decoy" = "salmon", "Canonical" = "darkgreen", "NonPRPF8" = "steelblue")) +
  labs(title = "t-SNE Analysis - Colored by Data Origin",
       subtitle = "Variables: max_spliceai_score, data_origin, gene_name (all genes)",
       x = "t-SNE Dimension 1",
       y = "t-SNE Dimension 2",
       color = "Data Origin") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.position = "right")

print(p_tsne_origin)

# Plot t-SNE colored by top genes (most frequent)
gene_freq_tsne <- combined_transformed %>%
  count(gene_name, sort = TRUE)
top_genes_tsne <- gene_freq_tsne$gene_name[1:min(10, nrow(gene_freq_tsne))]

tsne_coords_gene <- tsne_coords %>%
  mutate(
    gene_category = ifelse(gene_name %in% top_genes_tsne, 
                          gene_name, 
                          "Other")
  )

p_tsne_gene <- ggplot(tsne_coords_gene, aes(x = tSNE1, y = tSNE2, color = gene_category)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(viridis::viridis(10), "Other" = "grey80")) +
  labs(title = "t-SNE Analysis - Colored by Gene (Top 10)",
       subtitle = "Variables: max_spliceai_score, data_origin, gene_name",
       x = "t-SNE Dimension 1",
       y = "t-SNE Dimension 2",
       color = "Gene") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.position = "right")

print(p_tsne_gene)

# Calculate within-group distances for origin vs gene
origin_groups <- split(tsne_coords, tsne_coords$data_origin)
gene_groups <- split(tsne_coords_gene, tsne_coords_gene$gene_category)

cat("\nAverage within-group distances:\n")
for (group_name in names(origin_groups)) {
  if (nrow(origin_groups[[group_name]]) > 1) {
    dists <- dist(origin_groups[[group_name]][, c("tSNE1", "tSNE2")])
    cat(sprintf("  %s (origin): %.3f\n", group_name, mean(dists)))
  }
}

cat("\nTop gene groups (average distances):\n")
for (group_name in names(gene_groups)[1:min(5, length(gene_groups))]) {
  if (nrow(gene_groups[[group_name]]) > 1) {
    dists <- dist(gene_groups[[group_name]][, c("tSNE1", "tSNE2")])
    cat(sprintf("  %s (gene): %.3f\n", group_name, mean(dists)))
  }
}
```

================================================================
PhyloP combined analysis
================================================================

```{r phylop-faceted-histograms}
# Create faceted histograms for each phyloP metric across three datasets
# Filter to only rows with phyloP data
phylop_for_plotting <- combined_transformed %>%
  filter(!is.na(mean_phylop)) %>%
  mutate(
    data_origin = factor(data_origin, levels = c("Decoy", "Canonical", "NonPRPF8"))
  )

phylop_histograms <- list()

# 1. Mean phyloP
if ("mean_phylop" %in% colnames(phylop_for_plotting)) {
  h1 <- ggplot(phylop_for_plotting, aes(x = mean_phylop, fill = data_origin)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 50, alpha = 0.7, color = "black", position = "identity") +
    facet_wrap(~ data_origin, ncol = 3) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Decoy" = "salmon", "Canonical" = "darkgreen", "NonPRPF8" = "steelblue")) +
    labs(title = "Mean phyloP Distribution by Data Origin",
         x = "Mean phyloP",
         y = "Frequency",
         fill = "Data Origin") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "bottom")
  phylop_histograms[[1]] <- h1
}

# 2. Max phyloP
if ("max_phylop" %in% colnames(phylop_for_plotting)) {
  h2 <- ggplot(phylop_for_plotting, aes(x = max_phylop, fill = data_origin)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 50, alpha = 0.7, color = "black", position = "identity") +
    facet_wrap(~ data_origin, ncol = 3) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Decoy" = "salmon", "Canonical" = "darkgreen", "NonPRPF8" = "steelblue")) +
    labs(title = "Max phyloP Distribution by Data Origin",
         x = "Max phyloP",
         y = "Frequency",
         fill = "Data Origin") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "bottom")
  phylop_histograms[[2]] <- h2
}

# 3. Fraction constrained
if ("fraction_constrained" %in% colnames(phylop_for_plotting)) {
  h3 <- ggplot(phylop_for_plotting, aes(x = fraction_constrained, fill = data_origin)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 50, alpha = 0.7, color = "black", position = "identity") +
    facet_wrap(~ data_origin, ncol = 3) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Decoy" = "salmon", "Canonical" = "darkgreen", "NonPRPF8" = "steelblue")) +
    labs(title = "Fraction Constrained (phyloP > 1.3) by Data Origin",
         x = "Fraction Constrained",
         y = "Frequency",
         fill = "Data Origin") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "bottom")
  phylop_histograms[[3]] <- h3
}

# 4. Fraction constrained p01
if ("fraction_constrained_p01" %in% colnames(phylop_for_plotting)) {
  h4 <- ggplot(phylop_for_plotting, aes(x = fraction_constrained_p01, fill = data_origin)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 50, alpha = 0.7, color = "black", position = "identity") +
    facet_wrap(~ data_origin, ncol = 3) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Decoy" = "salmon", "Canonical" = "darkgreen", "NonPRPF8" = "steelblue")) +
    labs(title = "Fraction Constrained (phyloP > 2.0) by Data Origin",
         x = "Fraction Constrained (p<0.01)",
         y = "Frequency",
         fill = "Data Origin") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "bottom")
  phylop_histograms[[4]] <- h4
}

# 5. Sum positive phyloP
if ("sum_positive_phylop" %in% colnames(phylop_for_plotting)) {
  h5 <- ggplot(phylop_for_plotting, aes(x = sum_positive_phylop, fill = data_origin)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 50, alpha = 0.7, color = "black", position = "identity") +
    facet_wrap(~ data_origin, ncol = 3) +
    scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10", labels = scales::trans_format("log10", scales::math_format(10^.x))) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Decoy" = "salmon", "Canonical" = "darkgreen", "NonPRPF8" = "steelblue")) +
    labs(title = "Sum Positive phyloP Distribution (log10 scale) by Data Origin",
         x = "Sum Positive phyloP (log10)",
         y = "Frequency",
         fill = "Data Origin") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "bottom")
  phylop_histograms[[5]] <- h5
}

# Display all histograms
if (length(phylop_histograms) > 0) {
  for (i in 1:length(phylop_histograms)) {
    print(phylop_histograms[[i]])
  }
}
```
